52.reason: [Memory leak: q is not freed when merging terms with the same exponent. Additionally, if the resulting coefficient becomes 0, the term should ideally be removed from the list.]

65.reason: [Error: Only frees the first node, causing memory leak; should free all nodes in a loop]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Potential memory leak: only the head node is freed; other nodes in the list are not freed.

66.reason: [Incorrect freeing: only head and q are freed, but the entire linked list should be traversed and each node freed individually. Also, q may be NULL or already freed, leading to undefined behavior.]

25.reason: [In C89/ANSI C standard, variable declarations must be placed at the beginning of a block before any executable statements. Declaring variables after statements causes a compilation error in strict C environments.]
